---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the gap or limitation you've run into.

**Proposed solution**
How you imagine this could work. Don't worry about implementation details.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you've thought about, if any.

**Is this in the ROADMAP.md?**
If so, link to the relevant section. If not, this might be a good addition.
